data.title: BSc in Computer Science
data.subtitle: Babeș-Bolyai University of Cluj-Napoca
description: Completed a broad curriculum covering algorithms, data structures, databases, operating systems, and web technologies.
Studied foundational mathematics including linear algebra, discrete mathematics, probability, and mathematical logic, which supported more advanced topics in computer science.
Gained practical experience through coursework in software engineering, systems programming, and project-based labs.
Developed core skills in both backend and frontend development, as well as theoretical computer science.
Final project focused on movie scene segmentation using computer vision and AI, applying pattern recognition techniques to automate multimedia analysis.
